Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.util

Class Strings

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.util.Strings
public final class Strings
extends Object
String helper functions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static String capitalize​(String str)
    Capitalizes the first letter of each word.

  • Method Details

    • capitalize

      public static String capitalize​(String str)
      Capitalizes the first letter of each word.
      Parameters:
      str - a string
      Returns:
      a string with the first letter of each word capitalized
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if str is null

    • lastConsecutiveIndexOf

      public static int lastConsecutiveIndexOf​(String source, String target)
      Returns the index within source of the last consecutive occurrence of target. The last occurrence of the empty string "" is considered to occur at the index value source.length().

      The returned index is the largest value k for which source.startsWith(target, k) consecutively. If no such value of k exists, then -1 is returned.

      Parameters:
      source - the string to search within
      target - the string to search for
      Returns:
      the index of the last consecutive occurrence of target in source, or -1 if there is no such occurrence.

    • lastIndexOf

      public static Optional<MatchResult> lastIndexOf​(String source, Pattern target)
      Returns the last match returned by a regular expression.
      Parameters:
      source - the string to search within
      target - the regular expression to search for
      Returns:
      the match result associated with the last occurrence of target in source

    • containsOnly

      public static boolean containsOnly​(String source, String target)
      Parameters:
      source - the string to search within
      target - the string to search for
      Returns:
      true if source only contains (potentially multiple) occurrences of target or if source is empty

    • toCodepoints

      public static List<Integer> toCodepoints​(String source)
      Parameters:
      source - a string
      Returns:
      a view of the string as a list of codepoints

    • fromCodepoints

      public static String fromCodepoints​(List<Integer> codepoints)
      Parameters:
      codepoints - String codepoints
      Returns:
      the String representation of the codepoints
